ham.subject: Transaction Alert: $250.00 Debited from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

We want to inform you that a transaction of $250.00 was debited from your account ending in 1234 on 15 April 2026 at 10:45 AM. The transaction was made at ABC Retail.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately.

Thank you,
Your Bank
<URL>

spam.subject: Income Tax Department Refund – Claim Your Refund Now!
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

The Income Tax Department has approved your refund of $3,000.00 for the tax year 2025. To receive the refund, please verify your bank account details by clicking <URL> within 48 hours. Failure to verify may result in delay.

Thank you,
Income Tax Department
<URL>
